title: 5 Popular Garden Plants That Suffer Most During a Heatwave – and How to Save Them - House Beautiful

full_text:
Summer brings plenty of nourishing sunshine, helping gardens burst into bloom, but it's also a precarious time for plants. Too much heat can quickly become a problem, putting them under stress – and some more than others.
'While many garden plants can cope with periods of warm weather, prolonged heatwaves can put extra stress on varieties that prefer cooler, moist conditions,' says Dobbies' plant buyer, Nigel Lawton.
'Keeping an eye out for the early signs of heat stress and making a few simple adjustments can help your garden continue to thrive throughout the summer.'
